create-pdf-title-page-custom-font-color.title: Create PDF Title Page with Custom Font and Color
create-pdf-title-page-custom-font-color.description: Demonstrates how to create a new PDF document, add a title page, and format the title text with a custom font, size, and color using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-highres-image-into-pdf.title: Insert High-Resolution Image into PDF with Absolute Positioning
insert-highres-image-into-pdf.description: Demonstrates adding a high‑resolution JPEG image to a new PDF page at a specific location using absolute coordinates.

create-searchable-pdf-invisible-text.title: Create Searchable PDF by Overlaying Invisible Text
create-searchable-pdf-invisible-text.description: Demonstrates how to make a scanned PDF searchable by adding invisible OCR text over each page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-paragraph-indentation-line-spacing.title: Add Paragraph with Indentation and Line Spacing to PDF
add-paragraph-indentation-line-spacing.description: Shows how to load or create a PDF, define a text rectangle, set first‑line and subsequent line indents, apply custom line spacing, and save the document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-multi-level-toc-to-pdf.title: Add Multi-Level Table of Contents to PDF
add-multi-level-toc-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to enable auto‑tagging, generate a logical structure, create a TOC element, insert a dedicated TOC page, and configure page information using Aspose.Pdf.

customize-pdf-toc-formatting.title: Customize PDF Table of Contents Formatting
customize-pdf-toc-formatting.description: Demonstrates how to configure a PDF's Table of Contents using Aspose.Pdf by disabling page numbers and setting different TabLeaderType values for each TOC level.

remove-page-from-pdf.title: Remove a Page from PDF and Renumber Remaining Pages
remove-page-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to delete a specific page from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and automatically renumber the remaining pages, then save the result.

insert-blank-cover-page-into-pdf.title: Insert Blank Cover Page into PDF
insert-blank-cover-page-into-pdf.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF with Aspose.Pdf, insert an empty page at the beginning as a cover sheet, and save the updated document.

replace-word-in-pdf.title: Replace Specific Word in PDF While Preserving Formatting
replace-word-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to search for a word in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf, replace each occurrence with a new word, and keep the original text formatting intact.

extract-images-from-pdf-to-png.title: Extract Images from PDF and Save as PNG
extract-images-from-pdf-to-png.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages and embedded images, and save each image as a PNG file while preserving the original resolution.

add-digital-signature-field-and-sign-pdf.title: Add Digital Signature Field and Sign PDF with Self‑Signed Certificate
add-digital-signature-field-and-sign-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a signature field in a PDF, configure a PKCS#1 signature using a self‑signed PFX certificate, and save the signed document using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-pdf-a1a-compliance-report.title: Validate PDF for PDF/A-1A Compliance and Generate Report
validate-pdf-a1a-compliance-report.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, validate it against the PDF/A‑1A standard, and save a detailed validation report to a file.

validate-pdf-a1b-compliance.title: Validate PDF for PDF/A-1B Compliance and Log Results
validate-pdf-a1b-compliance.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, validate it against the PDF/A‑1B standard, and write a validation log file. Also demonstrates checking the IsPdfaCompliant property.

clean-pdf-remove-metadata-embedded-files.title: Clean PDF by Removing Metadata and Embedded Files
clean-pdf-remove-metadata-embedded-files.description: Loads a PDF, removes all metadata, PDF/A and PDF/UA compliance, deletes embedded attachments, and optimizes the document to reduce its size.

set-pdf-expiration-date.title: Set PDF Expiration Date with JavaScript
set-pdf-expiration-date.description: Shows how to embed a document‑level JavaScript action that closes the PDF when the current date exceeds a specified expiration date.

flatten-pdf-form-fields.title: Flatten PDF Form Fields to Static Content
flatten-pdf-form-fields.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with interactive form fields, flatten them into static content, and save the resulting document using Aspose.Pdf.

check-pdf-incremental-updates.title: Check PDF for Incremental Updates
check-pdf-incremental-updates.description: Loads a PDF file with Aspose.Pdf and determines whether it contains incremental updates, indicating the document was modified after its initial creation.

monitor-pdf-conversion-progress.title: Monitor PDF to HTML Conversion Progress
monitor-pdf-conversion-progress.description: Demonstrates how to attach a custom progress handler to an Aspose.Pdf conversion, handling progress events while saving a PDF as HTML and updating a UI element (console example).

add-watermark-layer-merge-pdf-layers.title: Add Watermark Layer and Merge PDF Layers
add-watermark-layer-merge-pdf-layers.description: Loads an existing PDF, adds an image watermark as a separate layer on each page, merges all layers into a single layer, and saves the modified document.

add-accessibility-tags-to-pdf.title: Add Accessibility Tags to PDF (Headings, Paragraphs, Tables)
add-accessibility-tags-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates enabling auto‑tagging, setting document language and title, and inserting heading, paragraph, and table elements with proper accessibility tags using Aspose.Pdf's TaggedContent API.

attach-pdf-portfolio-with-description.title: Attach PDF Portfolio with Custom Description
attach-pdf-portfolio-with-description.description: Demonstrates embedding a PDF portfolio file into another PDF and setting a custom description metadata for the attached file using Aspose.Pdf.

update-pdf-author-title-metadata.title: Update PDF Author and Title Metadata
update-pdf-author-title-metadata.description: The example loads a PDF, reads its current Author and Title metadata, updates these fields, and saves the modified document to a new file.

encrypt-pdf-with-passwords-and-permissio.title: Encrypt PDF with User and Owner Passwords and Set Permissions
encrypt-pdf-with-passwords-and-permissio.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, apply AES‑256 encryption with separate user and owner passwords, define allowed permissions, and save the protected document.

print-pdf-to-default-printer.title: Print PDF Directly to Default Printer
print-pdf-to-default-printer.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfViewer, configure basic print options, and send the document to the default printer without displaying any dialogs.

interrupt-resume-large-pdf-save.title: Interrupt and Resume Large PDF Save
interrupt-resume-large-pdf-save.description: Shows how to pause a long‑running PDF save using Aspose.Pdf's InterruptMonitor and CancellationToken, release resources, and then resume the save operation.

generate-crash-report-pdf.title: Generate Crash Report PDF from Exception
generate-crash-report-pdf.description: Shows how to create an HTML crash report for a caught exception using Aspose.Pdf's built‑in utility and then convert that report to a PDF document.

embed-zugferd-xml-into-pdf.title: Embed ZUGFeRD XML into PDF and Verify
embed-zugferd-xml-into-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to attach a ZUGFeRD invoice XML file to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, then reloads the PDF to confirm the attachment is present.

add-open-action-javascript-to-pdf.title: Add Open-Action JavaScript to PDF
add-open-action-javascript-to-pdf.description: Shows how to embed JavaScript in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf so that an alert dialog appears when the document is opened.

combine-multiple-html-to-pdf.title: Combine Multiple HTML Strings into a Single PDF
combine-multiple-html-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates converting a collection of HTML fragments to PDF using Aspose.Pdf with custom HtmlLoadOptions and merging the generated pages into one document.

add-styled-table-with-borders-and-altern.title: Add Styled Table with Borders and Alternating Row Colors to PDF
add-styled-table-with-borders-and-altern.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, create a table with a full border, set column widths, style the header, add data rows with alternating background colors, and save the result.

add-hyperlink-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Hyperlink Annotation to PDF
add-hyperlink-annotation-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to insert a clickable link annotation that opens an external website in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-image-in-pdf-page.title: Replace Image on PDF Page
replace-image-in-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, locating a page, checking for image resources, replacing the first image with a new one while preserving its placement, and saving the updated document.

add-page-numbers-to-pdf-footer.title: Add Page Numbers to PDF Footer
add-page-numbers-to-pdf-footer.description: Shows how to insert dynamic page numbers into the footer of each page in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PageNumberStamp.

multi-section-pdf-different-page-sizes.title: Create Multi-Section PDF with Different Page Sizes and Orientations
multi-section-pdf-different-page-sizes.description: Shows how to add multiple pages to a PDF, each with its own page size and portrait or landscape orientation using Aspose.Pdf.

merge-pdfs-preserve-bookmarks.title: Merge PDFs While Preserving Bookmarks
merge-pdfs-preserve-bookmarks.description: Demonstrates how to combine two PDF files into a single document using Aspose.Pdf, keeping the outlines (bookmarks) from both source files.

extract-text-from-pdf-pages.title: Extract Text from Specific PDF Pages
extract-text-from-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract text from a defined page range using TextAbsorber, and write the extracted content to a plain‑text file.

add-company-logo-header-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Company Logo Header to PDF Pages
add-company-logo-header-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, create an ImageStamp with a company logo, place it as a header on every page, and save the modified document.

set-pdf-metadata-creation-modification-k.title: Set PDF Creation/Modification Dates and Keywords
set-pdf-metadata-creation-modification-k.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, assign creation and modification dates and custom keywords, and save the updated file.

create-pdf-with-embedded-truetype-font.title: Create PDF with Embedded TrueType Font
create-pdf-with-embedded-truetype-font.description: Shows how to embed a TrueType font (e.g., Arial) into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, add text with that font, and embed standard fonts.

apply-semi-transparent-image-watermark-t.title: Apply Semi-Transparent Image Watermark to PDF Pages
apply-semi-transparent-image-watermark-t.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, add a semi‑transparent PNG as a watermark artifact on each page, and save the watermarked document.

create-pdf-clickable-table-of-contents.title: Create PDF with Clickable Table of Contents
create-pdf-clickable-table-of-contents.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF that contains a table of contents where each entry links to the corresponding section heading using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-all-annotations-from-pdf.title: Remove All Annotations from a PDF
remove-all-annotations-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, delete every annotation, and save the cleaned document.

add-signature-field-with-styled-appearan.title: Add Signature Field with Styled Appearance to PDF
add-signature-field-with-styled-appearan.description: Demonstrates how to insert a signature form field into a PDF and set its default appearance (font, size, color) to match the document style using Aspose.Pdf.

encrypt-pdf-aes256-restrict-print-copy.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Restrict Printing/Copying
encrypt-pdf-aes256-restrict-print-copy.description: Shows how to load a PDF, apply AES‑256 encryption with user and owner passwords, set permissions to prevent printing and content extraction, and save the encrypted document.

create-pdf-portfolio.title: Create PDF Portfolio with Embedded Files
create-pdf-portfolio.description: Shows how to bundle several PDF documents into a single PDF portfolio using Aspose.Pdf by creating a Document, adding FileSpecification objects to its Collection, and saving the combined file.

add-custom-xml-metadata-to-pdf.title: Add Custom XML Metadata to PDF Document
add-custom-xml-metadata-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add custom key‑value pairs, such as XML fragments, to a PDF's document information dictionary and save the modified file.

add-line-annotation-with-color-and-thick.title: Add Line Annotation with Color and Thickness to PDF
add-line-annotation-with-color-and-thick.description: Demonstrates how to create a line annotation on a PDF page, set its color, and adjust its thickness using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-pdf-page-with-html.title: Replace PDF Page with HTML-Generated Page
replace-pdf-page-with-html.description: Demonstrates loading an existing PDF, converting an HTML file to a PDF page, and replacing a specified page in the original document with the new HTML‑derived page.

add-javascript-sum-calculation-to-pdf-fo.title: Add JavaScript Sum Calculation to PDF Form
add-javascript-sum-calculation-to-pdf-fo.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with two numeric fields and a read‑only result field, then attaching a JavaScript action that automatically calculates and displays their sum.

create-pdf-dynamic-table.title: Create PDF with Dynamic Table from DataTable
create-pdf-dynamic-table.description: Demonstrates generating a PDF document that contains a table whose rows are populated dynamically from a DataTable using Aspose.Pdf.

create-zugferd-pdf-invoice.title: Create ZUGFeRD PDF Invoice with Embedded XML
create-zugferd-pdf-invoice.description: Shows how to generate a PDF invoice, add basic text, bind a ZUGFeRD XML file, convert the document to PDF/A‑3U (ZUGFeRD) and save the result.

create-pdf-with-clickable-index.title: Create PDF with Clickable Index
create-pdf-with-clickable-index.description: Shows how to generate a PDF that contains an index page with clickable links that jump to corresponding section pages using Aspose.Pdf.

add-background-template-to-all-pdf-pages.title: Add Background Template to All PDF Pages
add-background-template-to-all-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to load a PDF and a background template, create a PdfPageStamp, and apply it as a background to every page of the document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-signature-image-to-last-page.title: Add Signature Image to Last Page of PDF
add-signature-image-to-last-page.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, creating an ImageStamp from a custom signature image, positioning it on the last page, and saving the signed document.

extract-embedded-files-from-pdf-portfoli.title: Extract Embedded Files from PDF Portfolio
extract-embedded-files-from-pdf-portfoli.description: Shows how to load a PDF portfolio with Aspose.Pdf, enumerate its EmbeddedFiles collection, and save each embedded file to a specified output directory.

magazine-pdf-multi-column.title: Create Magazine-Style PDF with Multi-Column Text and Advertising
magazine-pdf-multi-column.description: Shows how to generate a PDF with a two‑column article layout using a Table, and optionally add a top advertisement image and a decorative banner shape.

add-read-only-text-field-to-pdf.title: Add Read‑Only Text Field to PDF
add-read-only-text-field-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a TextBoxField in a PDF, assign a default value, set it to read‑only, and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-with-clickable-email-link.title: Create PDF with Clickable Email Link
create-pdf-with-clickable-email-link.description: Shows how to generate a PDF and add a link annotation that opens the default mail client using a mailto URI.

add-captions-below-images-in-pdf.title: Add Captions Below Images in PDF
add-captions-below-images-in-pdf.description: Shows how to iterate through images on each PDF page and insert a styled caption paragraph beneath each image using Aspose.Pdf.

pdf-toc-with-dot-leaders.title: Create PDF Table of Contents with Dot Leaders
pdf-toc-with-dot-leaders.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF containing a table of contents where each entry is aligned with custom dot leaders using Aspose.Pdf's TabStops and Table classes.

add-popup-note-annotation.title: Add Pop‑up Note Annotation to PDF
add-popup-note-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to add a TextAnnotation (sticky‑note) with an associated PopupAnnotation to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, and save the modified document.

add-header-current-date-javascript.title: Add Header with Current Date via JavaScript
add-header-current-date-javascript.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF with a header that displays the current date by using a DateField and a document‑level JavaScript action in Aspose.Pdf.

add-digital-signature-with-timestamp.title: Add Digital Signature with Trusted Timestamp to PDF
add-digital-signature-with-timestamp.description: Demonstrates how to create a signature field, configure a PKCS#7 signature with a trusted Time‑Stamp Authority, and apply the signature to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

create-5x7-inch-postcard-pdf.title: Create a 5x7 Inch Postcard PDF
create-5x7-inch-postcard-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF with a custom 5x7‑inch page size and add a simple text fragment using Aspose.Pdf.

add-background-color-to-pdf-page.title: Add Semi-Transparent Background Color to PDF Page
add-background-color-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to fill an entire PDF page with a semi‑transparent color by adding a rectangle shape to a Graph container and inserting it into the page content.

insert-a-page-from-one-pdf-into-another-.title: Insert A Page From One Pdf Into Another At A Specified Position

create-pdf-with-dropdown-form.title: Create PDF with Dropdown (Combo Box) Form Field
create-pdf-with-dropdown-form.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF containing a combo box form field and populate its options from an array using Aspose.Pdf.

add-page-count-footer-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Page Count Footer to PDF Pages
add-page-count-footer-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to add a custom footer that displays the current page number and total page count on each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-javascript-from-pdf.title: Remove JavaScript from PDF Document
remove-javascript-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, strip all document‑level and page‑level JavaScript actions, and remove JavaScript attached to annotations, then save the cleaned file.

create-pdf-table-with-merged-header-cell.title: Create PDF Table with Merged Header Cells
create-pdf-table-with-merged-header-cell.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF containing a table whose first header row has cells merged across multiple columns, using Aspose.Pdf.

add-link-annotation-open-embedded-pdf.title: Add Link Annotation to Open Embedded PDF
add-link-annotation-open-embedded-pdf.description: Shows how to embed a PDF file into another PDF and create a clickable link annotation that opens the attached document using a GoToRemoteAction.

create-rotated-landscape-pdf-page.title: Create Rotated Landscape PDF Page
create-rotated-landscape-pdf-page.description: Shows how to set a page size, rotate it to landscape orientation, and add a text fragment using Aspose.Pdf.

add-checked-checkbox-form-field.title: Add Checked Checkbox Form Field to PDF
add-checked-checkbox-form-field.description: Shows how to create a PDF document, add a checkbox form field, set its default state to checked, and save the file using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-pdf-outline-hierarchy.title: Extract and Print PDF Outline Hierarchy
extract-pdf-outline-hierarchy.description: Loads a PDF file, retrieves its outline (bookmarks) and prints the hierarchical structure to the console as a tree.

create-pdf-table-with-rich-text.title: Create PDF Table with Rich Text Formatting
create-pdf-table-with-rich-text.description: Shows how to generate a PDF containing a table where each cell displays text with different styles such as bold, italic, color, underline, and size using Aspose.Pdf.

add-text-stamp-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Text Stamp to PDF Pages
add-text-stamp-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, add a semi‑transparent text stamp (watermark) to each page, and save the result.

add-automatic-page-numbers-to-pdf.title: Add Automatic Page Numbers to PDF
add-automatic-page-numbers-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to stamp page numbers on all pages of a PDF, insert a new page, and refresh pagination so the numbers update automatically.

create-pdf-with-background-template.title: Create PDF with Background Template Page
create-pdf-with-background-template.description: Demonstrates how to use a PDF page as a background template for multiple pages in a new document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-visible-signature-field-and-lock-pdf.title: Add Visible Signature Field and Lock PDF after Signing
add-visible-signature-field-and-lock-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a visible signature field, apply a digital signature using a PFX certificate, and lock the PDF to prevent further modifications.

extract-text-from-pdf-to-utf8-file.title: Extract Text from PDF to UTF-8 File
extract-text-from-pdf-to-utf8-file.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract all pages' text using TextAbsorber, and save the result to a UTF‑8 encoded text file.

create-pdf-form-with-radio-buttons.title: Create PDF Form with Radio Button Groups
create-pdf-form-with-radio-buttons.description: Shows how to generate a PDF containing a form with multiple‑choice questions by adding radio button fields for each question.

add-javascript-calculation-to-pdf-form.title: Calculate Total of Numeric Fields in PDF Form
add-javascript-calculation-to-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates creating numeric form fields and a read‑only total field in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, then attaching JavaScript to automatically sum the numbers and display the result.

extract-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.title: Extract XMP Metadata from PDF
extract-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and extract its embedded XMP metadata, saving it as an XML file.

create-multi-page-table-pdf.title: Create Multi-Page Table in PDF
create-multi-page-table-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF with a table that automatically breaks across multiple pages using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

add-separator-line-annotation.title: Add Separator Line Annotation to PDF Page
add-separator-line-annotation.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, create a line annotation as a visual separator, add it to a page, and save the updated document.

rotate-pdf-pages-90-degrees.title: Rotate PDF Pages to 90 Degrees
rotate-pdf-pages-90-degrees.description: Loads a PDF document, sets each page's rotation to 90 degrees for portrait display on landscape devices, and saves the modified file.

create-pdf-with-date-picker.title: Create PDF with Date Picker Form Field
create-pdf-with-date-picker.description: Shows how to generate a PDF document that contains a date picker (DateField) form field using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-hyperlinks-from-pdf.title: Extract Hyperlinks from PDF to Text File
extract-hyperlinks-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through pages and link annotations, and write each URI action to a plain‑text list.

load-pdf-into-document.title: Load PDF into Aspose.Pdf Document
load-pdf-into-document.description: Shows how to load a PDF file into an Aspose.Pdf Document object with file existence checking and proper disposal using a using block.

remove-all-annotations-pdf.title: Remove All Annotations from PDF using HiddenDataSanitizer
remove-all-annotations-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to configure HiddenDataSanitizerOptions to strip every annotation from a PDF document and save the sanitized result.

sanitize-pdf-remove-embedded-scripts.title: Sanitize PDF by Removing Embedded Scripts and Files
sanitize-pdf-remove-embedded-scripts.description: Demonstrates how to configure Aspose.Pdf's hidden‑data sanitizer to delete embedded JavaScript actions and embedded files before sanitizing a PDF document.

sanitize-pdf-remove-metadata-private-inf.title: Sanitize PDF by Removing Metadata and Private Information
sanitize-pdf-remove-metadata-private-inf.description: Loads a PDF, clears standard metadata, PDF/A and PDF/UA compliance flags, and applies optimization options to strip private info and unused resources before saving the sanitized document.

convert-pdf-pages-to-images-html-150-dpi.title: Convert PDF Pages to Images in HTML at 150 DPI
convert-pdf-pages-to-images-html-150-dpi.description: Loads a PDF document and saves it as HTML where each page is rasterized to an external PNG image using a 150 DPI resolution.

compress-pdf-images-and-convert-pages-to.title: Compress PDF Images and Convert Pages to JPEG
compress-pdf-images-and-convert-pages-to.description: Demonstrates applying JPEG compression (quality 80) to images inside a PDF using OptimizationOptions, then rendering each page as a JPEG image with a specified resolution and output quality.

convert-pdf-pages-to-jpeg-no-compression.title: Convert PDF Pages to JPEG Without Image Compression
convert-pdf-pages-to-jpeg-no-compression.description: The example loads a PDF, disables image compression using OptimizationOptions, and converts each page to a high‑quality JPEG image with JpegDevice.

convert-pdf-pages-to-png-images.title: Convert PDF Pages to PNG Images
convert-pdf-pages-to-png-images.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page, and save every page as an individual PNG image using a specified resolution.

sanitize-hidden-data-selective-rasteriza.title: Sanitize Hidden PDF Data with Selective Page Rasterization
sanitize-hidden-data-selective-rasteriza.description: Demonstrates creating a HiddenDataSanitizerOptions.All configuration, disabling global rasterization, enabling it only for chosen pages, removing metadata, JavaScript, and annotations, and then saving the optimized PDF.

remove-annotations-and-attachments.title: Remove Annotations and Attachments from PDF
remove-annotations-and-attachments.description: Shows how to delete all comments/annotations and embedded file attachments from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and then save the cleaned document.

sanitize-pdfs-remove-metadata.title: Sanitize PDFs by Removing Metadata and Compliance Tags
sanitize-pdfs-remove-metadata.description: Loads PDF files from a folder, removes metadata, accessibility and archival tags, flattens forms, optimizes resources, and saves cleaned copies to an output directory.

generate-crash-report-for-pdfexception.title: Generate Crash Report for PdfException
generate-crash-report-for-pdfexception.description: Demonstrates catching a PdfException when loading a PDF, configuring CrashReportOptions, and generating an HTML crash report using Aspose.Pdf.

customize-crash-report-filename.title: Customize Crash Report Filename with Aspose.Pdf
customize-crash-report-filename.description: Demonstrates how to set a custom message and override the default file name when generating a crash report using Aspose.Pdf's CrashReportOptions.

generate-crash-report-with-custom-output.title: Generate Crash Report with Custom Output Directory
generate-crash-report-with-custom-output.description: Demonstrates how to configure CrashReportOptions to set a custom directory and filename for a crash report, generate the report with Aspose.Pdf, and verify that the file was created.

pdf-processing-with-crash-report.title: PDF Processing with Detailed Crash Reporting
pdf-processing-with-crash-report.description: The example loads a PDF, adds a blank page, saves the document, and wraps the operation in try‑catch blocks that generate detailed Aspose.Pdf crash reports for both library‑specific and unexpected errors.

create-pdf-with-level-1-heading.title: Create PDF with a Level 1 Heading
create-pdf-with-level-1-heading.description: Demonstrates how to create a new PDF document, add a tagged Level 1 heading (H1) to the structure tree, and save the file using Aspose.Pdf.

hierarchical-numbered-headings.title: Create Hierarchical Numbered Headings in PDF
hierarchical-numbered-headings.description: Demonstrates how to apply a decimal numbering style to Heading objects to generate hierarchical numbers (chapter, section, subsection) in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-structured-headings-and-toc.title: Add Structured Headings and Table of Contents to PDF
add-structured-headings-and-toc.description: Shows how to insert Heading elements with different numbering styles, enable auto‑tagging, create a TOC element, and save the updated PDF.

add-outline-item-to-pdf.title: Add Outline Item (Bookmark) to PDF
add-outline-item-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a new outline (bookmark) in an existing PDF, set its destination to a page, and save the updated document.

add-dynamic-heading-to-pdf.title: Add Dynamic Heading to PDF
add-dynamic-heading-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF template, creating a level‑1 heading with dynamic user name and date, positioning and styling it, adding it to the first page, and saving the result using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-with-headings-and-sanitize.title: Create PDF with Headings and Sanitize While Preserving Structure
create-pdf-with-headings-and-sanitize.description: Demonstrates generating a PDF with hierarchical, auto‑numbered headings using Aspose.Pdf and then creating a sanitized copy by removing annotations while keeping the heading structure intact.

remove-hidden-data-and-retag-pdf.title: Remove Hidden Data and Re‑Tag PDF for Navigation
remove-hidden-data-and-retag-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, stripping hidden metadata and compliance information, optimizing resources, and re‑applying auto‑tagging with language and title to preserve navigation after cleaning.

batch-sanitize-pdfs.title: Batch Sanitize PDFs and Save Cleaned Copies
batch-sanitize-pdfs.description: Shows how to process all PDF files in a folder, remove metadata and compliance flags, flatten content, optimize resources, and save sanitized versions using Aspose.Pdf.

sanitize-pdf-remove-metadata-flatten-for.title: Sanitize PDF by Removing Metadata and Flattening Forms
sanitize-pdf-remove-metadata-flatten-for.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, strip hidden metadata and compliance flags, flatten form fields, optimize resources, and save the sanitized document.

detect-hidden-annotations-in-pdf.title: Detect Hidden Annotations in PDF after Sanitization
detect-hidden-annotations-in-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, enable signature sanitization, and inspect each annotation for the Hidden flag to determine if any hidden annotations remain.

sanitize-pdf-keep-metadata.title: Sanitize PDF by Removing Hidden Content While Keeping Metadata
sanitize-pdf-keep-metadata.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's OptimizationOptions to strip hidden data such as private info, unused objects and streams from a PDF while preserving its metadata.

rasterize-pdf-to-png-with-compression.title: Rasterize PDF Pages to PNG with Compression Level
rasterize-pdf-to-png-with-compression.description: Shows how to configure ImageCompressionOptions to set the PNG compression level and rasterize each page of a PDF into lossless PNG images.

convert-pdf-pages-to-high-resolution-tif.title: Convert PDF Pages to High-Resolution TIFF Images
convert-pdf-pages-to-high-resolution-tif.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, configuring resolution and TIFF settings, and converting each page to a separate high‑DPI TIFF file.

convert-pdf-pages-to-png-images__v2.title: Convert PDF Pages to PNG Images
convert-pdf-pages-to-png-images__v2.description: Demonstrates how to convert each page of a PDF document to separate PNG image files using Aspose.Pdf and verifies the output with a unit test.

create-pdf-roman-headings-validate-seque.title: Create PDF with Roman Numeral Headings and Verify Order
create-pdf-roman-headings-validate-seque.description: Demonstrates generating a PDF with headings prefixed by Roman numerals using Aspose.Pdf and then validates that the headings appear in the correct sequential order by extracting and checking the text.

sanitize-pdf-add-headings.title: Sanitize PDF and Add Navigable Headings
sanitize-pdf-add-headings.description: Demonstrates how to clean a PDF by removing metadata, flattening forms, and optimizing resources, then automatically tag the document and create heading elements for better navigation.

generate-crash-report-with-custom-stack-.title: Generate Crash Report with Custom Stack Trace for PDF Operations
generate-crash-report-with-custom-stack-.description: This example shows how to catch PDF processing errors, create a CrashReportOptions object with a custom stack trace, and generate a crash report using Aspose.Pdf.

generate-pdf-crash-report-to-network-sha.title: Generate PDF Crash Report to Network Share
generate-pdf-crash-report-to-network-sha.description: Shows how to configure CrashReportOptions to write a PDF crash report to a network share (with a local fallback) and verify the file creation.

audit-pdf-sanitization-logging.title: Audit PDF Sanitization with Start/End Logging
audit-pdf-sanitization-logging.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, enabling signature sanitization, validating and saving it while recording the start time, end time, and duration to an audit log, with proper exception handling.
